shorts.title_distilled: ​‘The Office US’ cast: Where the Dunder Mifflin folks are now​.

shorts.title_distilled: AI boom has plunged a small Pennsylvania town into chaos.
shorts.description: Data centers will swallow 14 percent of Archbald, evict a trailer park, and border many residential properties. Who's to blame is a matter of fierce debate.

shorts.title: Council proposing drug ban within city limits

shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — Scranton officials announced a new ordinance Monday that would ban the sale of kratom, an over-the-counter substance known to produce opioid- and stimulant-like effects. The proposal aims to remove the product from local shelves following concerns about public safety and addiction. The Food and Drug Administration has not approved kratom [...]
